name: indexBy-non-vec-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :IndexBySubjectNotVec :message "indexBy requires Vec subject, got Number" :operand "indexBy" :position "subject" :expectedType "Vec" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "indexBy" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } }] :effectful false :text "indexBy(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: indexBy-non-keyword-key-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :IndexByKeyNotKeyword :message "indexBy: key sub-pipeline must produce a keyword for every element, element 0 produced Number" :index 0 :actualType "Number" :actualValue 1 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "indexBy" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 19 :line 1 :column 20 } :end { :offset 21 :line 1 :column 22 } } }] :effectful false :text "indexBy(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 11 :line 1 :column 12 } :end { :offset 22 :line 1 :column 23 } } } :input [{:k 1}] } :trail [] }
